author: @thecryptohulk
executive_summary: A YouTube content creator focused on cryptocurrency and digital assets submitted a comment urging the SEC to immediately implement crypto, blockchain, and fintech technologies into all applicable systems. The letter does not substantively address the specific rulemaking topics covered under File No. S7-2026-20, including order competition, best execution, tick size reform, or access fee reform. The comment is broadly pro-crypto advocacy with no market microstructure analysis.
retail_investor_arguments: Implicitly suggests that modernization through crypto and blockchain technology would benefit society broadly, though no specific retail investor protection arguments are made.
recommended_actions: Immediate implementation of crypto, blockchain, digital assets, and fintech technologies into all applicable systems.
key_quotes: Crypto, Blockchain, Digital Assets, Fintech and all related terminology shall be the basis for the future of the planet and thereby shall be implemented immediately into every system where possible ASAP.
Let's get this done to modernize the way we live.
